haus.metaTitle: The House — Prestige Selections Freiburg | Sports Car Dealer since 2012
haus.metaDescription: Family business for sports cars and classics in Freiburg since 2012. Over 900 motorcars placed. Founded by Sven Pflüger. Personal. Discreet.
haus.label: The House
haus.intro: Family business from Freiburg im Breisgau. Founded 2012 by Sven Pflüger. Specialising in sports cars and classics from private ownership — personally chosen, inspected before acquisition.
haus.founderPortraitAlt: Sven Pflüger, founder of Prestige Selections, in the atelier in Freiburg
haus.founderBody: Sven Pflüger leads Prestige Selections from Freiburg. He evaluates every motorcar personally — nothing enters the showroom without his approval. Three languages, one standard: only motorcars we'd drive ourselves.
haus.milestone1Text: Founded in Freiburg. First placement within the opening month.
haus.milestone2Text: Own master workshop opened — every marque serviced in-house.
haus.milestone3Text: 500th motorcar placed. European sports car specialisation deepened.
haus.milestone4Text: Move to Schusterstraße. More space, same standard.
haus.milestone5Text: Over 900 motorcars placed. Three generations of buyers across DE · CH · AT · FR · LI.
haus.value1Body: Every motorcar passes Sven's desk. No auction, no algorithm.
haus.value2Body: 142 inspection points before acquisition. Marque-workshop verification mandatory.
haus.value3Body: Complete history or not at all. Service book and previous-owner provenance standard.
haus.value4Body: Buyers and sellers remain anonymous. Confidentiality non-negotiable.

verkaufen.metaTitle: Sell your sports car Freiburg — Direct purchase by Prestige Selections
verkaufen.metaDescription: Sell Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley, Maserati, Rolls-Royce — discreet direct purchase in Freiburg. Valuation within 48 hours, market-correct price.
verkaufen.label: Selling
verkaufen.intro: We buy sports cars and classics directly from previous owners — personally, discreetly, at market value. No third-party commission. No auction risk. A concrete offer within 48 hours.
verkaufen.step1Body: Make, model, first registration, mileage, history, a few photos. By email, WhatsApp or phone. Discretion guaranteed.
verkaufen.step2Body: Sven reviews the data and comes back within 48 hours with a concrete price indication. If of interest: on-site viewing.
verkaufen.step3Body: Payment on the spot. Collection arranged by us. You keep the motorcar until funds clear in your account.
verkaufen.whatWeBuy1: Sports cars from 1990 onwards — Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley, Maserati, Rolls-Royce
verkaufen.whatWeBuy2: Classics and enthusiast pieces with verifiable history
verkaufen.whatWeBuy3: First owner or completely documented subsequent ownership
verkaufen.whatWeBuy5: Special editions, limited runs, factory configurations
verkaufen.heroImageAlt: Acquisition atelier — handover moment at the Prestige Selections showroom in Freiburg
verkaufen.faqHeading: What sellers from DE · CH · AT · FR ask us

faq.q1: How does selling my sports car to Prestige Selections work?
faq.a1: You send us the key facts and photos by e-mail, WhatsApp or phone. Sven evaluates personally. Within 48 hours you receive a concrete price indication. If of interest: on-site inspection in Freiburg or at your location. Immediate payment, clean documented hand-over.
faq.q2: How quickly do I get an offer for my Ferrari, Porsche or Aston Martin?
faq.a2: Within 48 hours of receiving your documents. No automated estimates, no bait offers — the indication comes from Sven personally, after reviewing history and condition.
faq.q3: Which sports-car marques do you buy directly?
faq.a3: Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley, Maserati, Rolls-Royce — modern sports cars from 1990 onwards as well as classics and collectibles with verifiable history.
faq.q4: Do you pay market-correct prices on direct purchase?
faq.a4: Yes. We buy for our own inventory — no third-party commission margin. Our prices are based on continuous market monitoring across DE, CH, AT, FR and on current auction results for comparable cars.
faq.q5: Do I have to bring the motorcar to Freiburg?
faq.a5: No. If we are interested we come to you — within Germany, Switzerland, Austria, France and Liechtenstein. Transport is organised at our cost if the sale goes through.
faq.q6: How secure is payment on the purchase?
faq.a6: You keep the car until the full purchase price has been credited to your account. Only then do you hand over keys and papers. No deposit arrangements, no escrow delays.
faq.a7: Yes. We disclose neither seller nor sale price. No web listing, no listing on third-party platforms without your explicit consent. Discretion is not a service — it is a prerequisite.
faq.q8: Is selling to a specialist worthwhile compared to a private sale?
faq.a8: For sports cars and classics, yes — once you factor in time, risk and discretion. You avoid test drives with strangers, disputes over defects, lawyer fees if the deal is unwound. We purchase with full legal certainty and assume the warranty risk.

abschluss.label: Buying
abschluss.headline: We make the offer. In person.
abschluss.subline: Sven appraises your car — discreet, market-fair, fast. A few photos are often enough to start.

verkaufen.step1Alt: Submission — vehicle entry with leather folder and specs on workbench, Freiburg atelier

schaufenster.intro: Three motorcars, personally chosen. This week in focus.
schaufenster.slideSub2: Six o'clock, ahead of everyone else.
schaufenster.v2Quote: Full specification. One family. One garage.
schaufenster.v4Quote: Full specification. Carbon package. One owner.

methode.label: The Method
methode.heading:
From first call
to the keys.
methode.tagline: Three steps. One hand. One hundred and forty-two checks between the first conversation and handover.
methode.step1Body: We acquire each motorcar from first hand — directly from the previous owner, not from a third source. You know who drove it, who serviced it, why it was let go.
methode.step2Body: Sven drives each motorcar personally before it goes online. Service records from first delivery. Original parts, factory procedures. You step in — and it works.
methode.step3Body: Come to Freiburg, or we deliver. Full documentation in your language. Warranty after handover. And yes — Sven personally hands over the keys.

spuren.label: Traces
spuren.intro: Fourteen years. Nine hundred hands. A selection of recent handovers.
spuren.q01: Third motorcar through Prestige. First time I asked questions, now I don't.
spuren.q02: I know the market. Sven knows more.
spuren.q03: They found the motorcar I'd been searching for two years.
spuren.q04: Appointment at four, handover by six. That's how it should be.
spuren.q05: You find an STO when you know who to ask.
spuren.q06: Delivered personally. No sales talk. Just the motorcar and the papers.
spuren.q07: Discreet and competent. My third motorcar through Prestige.
spuren.q08: Collected from the atelier. Looked for two hours, then drove.
spuren.q09: First hand, complete history. You hear that often. Here it was true.
spuren.q10: Second motorcar, I knew the routine. For the third I'll just call.
spuren.q11: Garage in Lyon, now garage here. The motorcar barely noticed.
spuren.q12: Prepared for Villa d'Este. They knew exactly what to do.
spuren.q13: One phone call, one test drive, one motorcar. Efficient.
spuren.q14: Fully documented. Maintenance plan, inspections, every receipt.
spuren.q15: Complete service book since first delivery. I checked it twice.
spuren.q16: Called Monday, met Wednesday, delivered Friday. As promised.
spuren.q17: Fourth through Sven. First time cautious, fourth time relaxed.
spuren.q18: He brought the motorcar himself. To the door, without fuss.
spuren.q19: Six months of searching, one call from Sven. That's how the DB11 happened.
spuren.q20: Documentation impeccable, condition as described. No surprises.
spuren.q21: Service book complete. Whoever keeps that for fifteen years has understood the motorcar.
spuren.q22: Three days to think, no pressure. That's rare these days.
spuren.q23: Garage in Lucerne, three thousand kilometres a year. The right way to own a motorcar.
spuren.q24: Original condition, one hand. I was looking, they had it.
spuren.q25: Personal handover in Stuttgart. One hour, everything settled.
spuren.q26: Prepared for Chantilly. Nothing left to chance.
spuren.q27: Specific configuration. Four months. Then the right motorcar.
spuren.q28: Second family motorcar through Prestige. My wife now asks them first.
spuren.q29: First hand from a retired owner. Six summers, twenty thousand kilometres.
spuren.q30: Daytona with matching numbers. Whoever finds that has done their homework.
spuren.q31: I didn't want a new Mulsanne. They had found a better one.
spuren.q32: Decided between meetings. Three weeks later it was in the hall.
spuren.q33: Third Aston from Sven. After the first I knew I'd be back.
spuren.q34: Service book complete, original invoice included. Motorcars like that don't surface often.
spuren.q35: Specific paint specification. Three months later the phone rang.
spuren.q36: Company car for four years. Sven knew the previous owner personally.
spuren.q37: Prepared for Salzburg Concours. Finished exactly on time.
spuren.q38: A DBS from '08. I'd searched three years, they had it in two weeks.
spuren.q39: Fourth Ferrari through Sven. We know each other better than some cousins.
spuren.q40: Four hundred kilometres a year. Motorcars like that are searched, not listed.
spuren.q41: Second Continental through Prestige. First time a customer, now nearly a regular.
spuren.q42: 991 R, one of 991. Availability is a question of trust.
spuren.q43: First hand, Swiss delivery, complete records. That's how it should be.
spuren.q44: Decided quickly, handled cleanly. I didn't need to check again.
spuren.q45: Delivered to my door, three hours of orientation. Nothing more needed.
spuren.q46: GT8s are rare. Four months, then the call from Freiburg.
spuren.q47: Coupé Aerodinamico, restored in Modena. Provenance documented.
spuren.q48: 991 Speedster, first owner, no trackdays. Whoever can show that knows what they have.
spuren.q49: Brooklands with Mulliner spec. Configurations like that disappear from the market.
spuren.q50: VT Roadster, complete history, original paint. A motorcar for the next generation.

eineStimme.label: One Voice
eineStimme.founderImageAlt: Sven Pflüger · Founder of Prestige Selections
eineStimme.editorial: You speak with Sven — from first call to the keys. No auction. No pressure. No commission. What we sell, we have bought, inspected and driven ourselves. At Schusterstraße in Freiburg since 2012. Nine hundred motorcars, personally handed over.

fragen.label: Common questions
fragen.intro: Eight questions we hear most often.
fragen.q01Question: What if a motorcar isn't as described?
fragen.q01Answer: We take it back. Without discussion. Twice in fourteen years was enough. Plus: twelve months dealer warranty on drivetrain and transmission, in-house workshop for follow-up service.
fragen.q02Answer: 142 points: body, drivetrain, transmission, electronics, interior, history, ownership trail. Sven personally plus the master mechanic. Protocol accompanies handover.
fragen.q03Answer: Bank transfer or solicitor escrow. 10% deposit at reservation. Financing through two partner banks on request. Cash only up to the legal threshold.
fragen.q04Question: How long does a search commission take?
fragen.q04Answer: Four months on average. Specific configurations take longer. We don't call until the right motorcar is available — no rushed suggestions.
fragen.q05Answer: DE · CH · AT · FR · LI as core region — handover in Freiburg or near the border. UK · Italy · Scandinavia at additional cost. Overseas via freight quote.
fragen.q06Answer: Yes. Export delivery with VAT exemption at the Swiss border. NoVA advisory for Austrian buyers separately. We know the process — no learning on your time.
fragen.q07Answer: Villa d'Este · Chantilly · Salzburg Concours · Goodwood Revival. Detailing, documentation, transport. Dates are tight — three months' lead time recommended.
fragen.q08Answer: Sven Pflüger, founder 2012. Family-owned. No sales hierarchy in between — no intermediary, no call centre, no 'your advisor is currently unavailable'.

abschluss.label: Let's talk.
abschluss.headline: Drop by for a coffee.
abschluss.subline: You speak with Sven — from the first call to the keys. Door open, coffee ready.
abschluss.portraitAlt: Sven Pflüger · Founder of Prestige Selections
abschluss.ankaufHint: Also have one? We'll make the offer. Personally, discreetly, at market value.

leistungen.label: Services
leistungen.intro: Four disciplines. One house. One hand on the keys.
leistungen.s1Body: You choose from thirty motorcars we ourselves have chosen. Personally driven before they go online. Complete history, on the record.
leistungen.s2Body: You send us the essentials. You have our offer before the weekend. Sale handled discreetly, payment the same day.
leistungen.s3Body: You hand over the keys. We return the motorcar with a service report. Marque-trained workshop in-house — no transport into unfamiliar hands.
leistungen.s4Body: You name the model. We find the motorcar — often before it is officially for sale. Personal delivery in Freiburg, or wherever you are.
leistungen.outro: Direct call, direct answer. Appointment not required.
leistungen.s4Manifesto: DE · EN · FR. You write in your language.

workshop.title: Master Workshop
workshop.subtitle: Specialised in the extraordinary
workshop.description: Our workshop is dedicated to sports cars and classics. Marques such as Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley, Maserati and many more are in the finest hands with us.
workshop.intro: Sports cars and classics — any age, any condition. Master-certified specialists only, equipped to manufacturer standards. Decades of experience with the details that make these motorcars what they are.

inspection.label: Inspection protocol
inspection.headline: One hundred and forty-two points. Before every handover.
inspection.body: Before any motorcar leaves the atelier, it passes a documented 142-point protocol. Four areas, seventeen disciplines, one master-mechanic per car. Each position documented — no tick without proof.
inspection.footnote: Protocol available as PDF on request after completion. Standard procedure, no additional charge.

promise.label: Our promise
promise.imageAlt: Atelier interior at Prestige Selections Freiburg — warm light, immaculate working surfaces

workshop.value1Body: Reliability. Genuine interest. We stand by enthusiasts and connoisseurs with counsel and craft — in technique and in finish.
workshop.value2Body: Master-certified specialists only. Workshop equipped to manufacturer standards. Decades of experience with sports cars and classics.
workshop.value3Body: A dedicated specialist for vehicle detailing and care. Devoted, meticulous — your motorcar in the finest hands.
workshop.value4Body: Sports cars and classics — Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley, Maserati, Mercedes. Any age, any condition.
workshop.value5Body: Maintenance, repair, detailing, bespoke wishes, restoration. Cleanliness and professionalism — always.
workshop.value6Body: Personal handover. Every step discussed. Full transparency. Pickup and delivery — gladly.
workshop.process1Body: We receive your motorcar in person, inspect it on site together with you.
workshop.process2Body: Every measure is discussed with you before we begin — no step without your word.
workshop.process3Body: Clean, professional, documented. Pickup and delivery on request.
workshop.riskReversal: Before every step: consultation. Before every task: transparency. Cleanliness is duty, not bonus.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & inspection
maintenance.text: Manufacturer-standard servicing for all sports car marques.

restoration.title: Classic car care
restoration.text: Devoted care and restoration of automotive classics.

detailing.title: Detailing
detailing.text: Professional vehicle care at the highest level.

workshop.brands: Marques we trust — and who trust us
workshop.faqHeading: What sports car owners from Freiburg ask us

faq.q1: Which sports car marques does your master workshop in Freiburg service?
faq.a1: We service Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley, Maserati, Rolls-Royce and Mercedes — modern motorcars as well as classics. Marque-specific diagnostic tools and genuine parts are standard equipment.
faq.q2: What does an inspection cost for a Ferrari, Porsche or Aston Martin?
faq.a2: Inspection scope follows the manufacturer's schedule — depending on marque, model and last service. We provide a written, binding estimate before every job. No hidden costs, no surprises at hand-over.
faq.q3: Do you offer a marque-certified workshop in Freiburg?
faq.a3: Our masters have years of specialisation in European sports car marques. Workshop equipped to manufacturer level, original diagnostic tools, genuine parts. Every step is discussed with you beforehand.
faq.q4: How long does a major inspection on a sports car take?
faq.a4: A regular inspection is usually completed within one to two working days. For more extensive work — brakes, clutch, classic-car care — we give you a binding time estimate before we begin.
faq.q5: Do you also handle restorations and classic-car care?
faq.a5: Yes. Classic sports cars need particular attention — from seasonal storage and exercise drives to full restoration. We look after classics long-term and in a value-preserving way.
faq.q6: Do you offer collection and delivery in and around Freiburg?
faq.a6: On request we collect and return cars across the Freiburg, Basel, Karlsruhe region and within Switzerland. A courtesy car can be arranged on demand.
faq.q7: Can I book servicing without having bought a car from you?
faq.a7: Of course. Our atelier services are open to every sports-car and classic owner — regardless of where the motorcar came from.
faq.q8: What sets your sports-car workshop apart from a brand dealer's service?
faq.a8: Personal hand-over to a master mechanic. Transparent discussion before every step. No flat-rate packages, no anonymity. You speak to the same person before and after the appointment — from first diagnosis to hand-over.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & Inspection
maintenance.subtitle: Manufacturer-standard servicing
maintenance.description: Regular maintenance is the best protection for your sports car. Our master-certified workshop carries out all inspections according to manufacturer specifications — with genuine parts, certified procedures, and the care that vehicles of this class deserve.
maintenance.features: Digital service history, Genuine parts from all manufacturers, Collection and delivery in Freiburg and surrounding areas, Courtesy vehicle on request

repair.title: Repair
repair.subtitle: Expert restoration to factory standard
repair.description: From diagnosis to repair — our team works with modern diagnostic equipment and genuine parts. Whether gearbox, suspension, or electronics: we understand the specifics of every marque and repair so precisely that you will not notice the difference — except that everything works perfectly again.
repair.features: Brand-specific diagnostic equipment, Genuine replacement parts, Transparent cost estimates, Documented repair history

klassiker.title: Classic Car Care
klassiker.subtitle: Devoted stewardship of automotive history
klassiker.description: Classic sports cars require special attention. Our specialists understand the mechanics, materials, and philosophy behind every classic. We care for your vehicle long-term — from seasonal storage to complete restoration.
klassiker.features: Climate-controlled storage, Regular exercise drives, Restoration planning, Value-preserving care

aufbereitung.title: Detailing
aufbereitung.subtitle: Professional care at the highest level
aufbereitung.description: Professional detailing restores your vehicle's brilliance — and protects it for the future. We work with the finest products and techniques: paint correction, ceramic coating, leather and interior care down to the smallest detail.
aufbereitung.features: Multi-stage paint correction, Ceramic coating, Leather and Alcantara care, Engine and underbody cleaning

We are not a platform — we are people who personally know, inspect and hand over every car. If you are thinking of buying or selling: what we have learned since 2012 is part of the hand-over.

ferrari.metaTitle: Ferrari Freiburg — Sales, Purchase & Workshop | Prestige Selections
ferrari.metaDescription: Buy, sell and service Ferrari in Freiburg. Inspected Ferrari from first ownership. Direct purchase, master workshop, complete history.
ferrari.intro: Ferraris are not investments — they are sculptures in motion. We carry selected Ferraris from first ownership, buy directly from previous owners and look after them in our master workshop. From 458 Italia through F430 and 488 GTB to the 296 GTB.
ferrari.body: Ferraris have been in our collection since day one. We know the tempers of the early V8s with dry-sump systems as well as the behaviour of modern hybrids in winter. On acquisition we are not impressed by configuration stickers — we read traces: complete Ferrari service stamps, original cable taping under the cover, no red paint marks in the engine bay. If something is missing, we say so — at acquisition and at sale.
ferrari.models: 458 Italia · 488 GTB · 488 Pista · 296 GTB · F430 · 612 Scaglietti · California T · Roma · SF90 Stradale · Daytona SP3

faq.q1: Which Ferraris do you currently carry?
faq.a1: Our current selection changes monthly. Typical in stock: 488 GTB, 458 Italia, F430, 296 GTB, California T and selected classics. Current cars are listed below or in the collection.
faq.q2: Do you also buy Ferraris directly?
faq.a2: Yes — sports cars from 1990 onwards, preferably first hand or with fully documented succession. Valuation within 48 hours, market-correct price, no third-party commission.
faq.q3: Does your workshop also repair Ferraris?
faq.a3: Our master workshop in Freiburg looks after Ferraris of all series — maintenance with service-booklet entry, repair with genuine parts, detailing and classic-car care.
faq.q4: How does Prestige Selections differ from a Ferrari authorised dealer?
faq.a4: We are not an authorised dealer — we are an independent specialist. Upside: no sales-volume quota, no marque pressure, personal acquisition by the owner. Downside: no factory-warranty handling for new cars. For well-kept used Ferraris the better address.

porsche.metaTitle: Porsche Freiburg — Sales, Purchase & Workshop | Prestige Selections
porsche.metaDescription: Buy, sell and service Porsche in Freiburg. Inspected 911, 718, Cayenne, Panamera, Taycan. Direct purchase, master workshop, documented history.
porsche.intro: Porsches have been part of us since 2012 — water-cooled 911s and early air-cooled alike. We carry selected 911s, 718 Caymans, Taycans and classics. Direct purchase, master workshop, complete history.
porsche.body: With Porsche, heritage and booklet count. We prefer cars with the service booklet directly from Porsche, ideally first owner. Classic 911s (G-Model, 964, 993) are rarer — but when we take one in, we run a full sub-identity check: engine number, body number, COA if available. On modern 911s (991, 992) and 718s we particularly look at PASM, Sport Chrono and PDLS — collector specifications hold value.
porsche.models: 911 · 911 Turbo · 911 GT3 · 911 GT3 RS · 718 Cayman · 718 Boxster · Taycan · Panamera · Cayenne · Macan · 928 · 944 · 968 · 964 · 993

faq.a1: Focus on 911 (modern and classic), 718 Cayman GT4, Taycan with collector specifications. Classic air-cooled Porsches (G-Model, 964, 993) rarer — but always with full provenance check.
faq.q2: Do you also buy Porsches directly?
faq.a2: Yes — modern sports cars from 1990, classics with verifiable history. We buy directly from previous owners, no auction route. Valuation in 48 hours.
faq.q3: Does your workshop have Porsche experience?
faq.a3: Our masters have worked on Porsches across all series for years — from 964 to Taycan. PIWIS diagnostics, genuine parts, service-booklet entry.
faq.a4: Yes, in our heritage atelier. Substance preservation rather than invasive restoration is our philosophy. Before every intervention we discuss with you what would be period-correct and what would be modernising.

lamborghini.metaTitle: Lamborghini Freiburg — Sales, Purchase & Workshop | Prestige Selections
lamborghini.metaDescription: Buy, sell and service Lamborghini in Freiburg. Huracán, Urus, Aventador and classics. Direct purchase, master workshop, personal hand-over.
lamborghini.intro: Lamborghini is theatre — and Italian engineering at once. We carry Huracán, Urus and selected Aventadors. Direct purchase, master workshop with Lamborghini experience, honest valuation.
lamborghini.body: On Lamborghini the temptation is to put the spectacle ahead of the engineering. We inspect before acquisition exactly as we would a Porsche: full lift diagnosis, service book, carbon inspection for stress cracks. Carbon-ceramic brakes are measured with a micrometer (replacement: 15-20k€). On Huracán and Aventador we particularly focus on clutch wear and exhaust condition.
lamborghini.models: Huracán · Huracán EVO · Huracán Tecnica · Huracán STO · Urus · Urus Performante · Urus SE · Aventador · Aventador SVJ · Gallardo · Diablo · Murciélago

faq.a1: Typical stock: Huracán variants, Urus and Urus Performante, selected Aventadors. Gallardo and classics rarer. Current selection below.
faq.q2: Do you also buy Lamborghinis directly?
faq.a2: Yes — modern Lamborghini from Gallardo (2003+), preferably first hand or full history. Direct valuation in 48 hours.
faq.q3: Can you carry out Lamborghini maintenance?
faq.a3: Yes. Our masters have years of Lamborghini experience — from service with Lamborghini diagnostics to carbon inspection and carbon-ceramic brake check.
faq.q4: What does servicing a Huracán or Urus cost?
faq.a4: Service scope varies by model and mileage. Before every job you receive a written, binding estimate. No hidden items.

aston-martin.metaTitle: Aston Martin Freiburg — Sales, Purchase & Workshop | Prestige Selections
aston-martin.metaDescription: Buy, sell and service Aston Martin in Freiburg. DB11, DBS, Vantage, DBX and classics. Direct purchase, master workshop.
aston-martin.intro: Aston Martin is understatement in motion. We carry DB11, DBS, Vantage, DBX — and selected classics. Direct purchase, master workshop, personal hand-over by Sven.
aston-martin.body: Aston Martin separates the modern (AM6/AM8 platforms) from the icons (DB series, Vanquish classics). Each world has its own inspection programme. On younger Astons: carbon-fibre bumpers, AMG V8 servicing, Mercedes electronics. On classics: walnut veneer condition, Connolly leather care, body substance under patina.
aston-martin.models: DB11 · DBS Superleggera · Vantage · Vantage AMR · DBX · DBX707 · DB9 · V8 Vantage · Rapide · One-77 · Vanquish

faq.q1: Which Aston Martins do you carry?
faq.a1: Typical stock: DB11, DBS Superleggera, new Vantage, DBX models. Classic DB7, DB9 and Vanquish rarer — when taken in, with full provenance check.
faq.q2: Do you also buy Aston Martins directly?
faq.a2: Yes — modern Astons from DB9 (2004+), classics with history. Directly from previous owners, no auction route.
faq.q3: Does your workshop have Aston Martin experience?
faq.a3: Yes, long-standing — both AMG V8 servicing and classic 4.7 V8 and 5.9 V12. Genuine parts, documented service protocol.
faq.q4: Can I store my Aston with you?
faq.a4: Yes, climate-controlled storage in Freiburg on request — with regular exercise drives to preserve substance.

bentley.metaTitle: Bentley Freiburg — Sales, Purchase & Workshop | Prestige Selections
bentley.metaDescription: Buy, sell and service Bentley in Freiburg. Continental GT, Bentayga, Flying Spur, Mulsanne. Direct purchase, master workshop.
bentley.intro: Bentley is substance, not show. We carry Continental GT, Bentayga, Flying Spur, Mulsanne — and selected classics. Direct purchase, master workshop with Bentley experience.
bentley.body: On Bentley, craftsmanship counts: double-stitched Connolly leather, root wood or carbon veneer, flawless panel gaps on doors. Before acquisition we examine every interior seam, every paint layer of the exterior. On Continental GT we focus on Mulliner specification, on Mulsanne on Crewe craftsmanship details that late-stamp builds often miss.
bentley.models: Continental GT · Continental GTC · Bentayga · Bentayga EWB · Flying Spur · Mulsanne · Brooklands · Arnage · Azure

faq.a1: Continental GT (W12 and V8), Bentayga, Flying Spur, selected Mulsanne. Classics (Arnage, Azure, Brooklands) rarer — with full provenance check.
faq.q2: Do you also buy Bentleys directly?
faq.a2: Yes — modern Bentleys from Continental GT (2003+), classics with verifiable history. Directly from previous owners.
faq.q3: What does your workshop check on a Bentley?
faq.a3: Mechanics (W12 / V8 with manufacturer diagnostics), air suspension, dual CAN-bus systems, Mulliner interior components. Genuine parts, service-booklet entry.

maserati.metaTitle: Maserati Freiburg — Sales, Purchase & Workshop | Prestige Selections
maserati.metaDescription: Buy, sell and service Maserati in Freiburg. GranTurismo, Quattroporte, Levante, MC20, GranCabrio. Direct purchase, master workshop.
maserati.intro: Maserati is the elegant variant of the Italian school. We carry GranTurismo, Quattroporte, Levante, MC20. Direct purchase, master workshop, personal acquisition.
maserati.body: With Maserati the V8 soundscape is legendary — and demands care. We check exhaust flaps, high-pressure pump and Ferrari engine components on the classic GranTurismo. On the modern MC20 we look at Nettuno V6 specifics, on Quattroporte at air suspension and interior substance.
maserati.models: GranTurismo · GranTurismo Trofeo · GranCabrio · Quattroporte · Levante · MC20 · MC20 Cielo · Ghibli · 3200 GT · 4200

faq.a1: Focus on GranTurismo (classic and new), Quattroporte, Levante, MC20. Older 3200 GT and 4200 possible with full provenance check.
faq.q2: Do you also buy Maserati directly?
faq.a2: Yes — modern Maserati from GranTurismo I (2007+), classics with documented history.
faq.a3: Yes. Our masters know both the classic 4.7 V8 with Ferrari origins and the modern Nettuno V6 and Levante components.

rolls-royce.metaTitle: Rolls-Royce Freiburg — Sales, Purchase & Workshop | Prestige Selections
rolls-royce.metaDescription: Buy, sell and service Rolls-Royce in Freiburg. Phantom, Ghost, Cullinan, Wraith, Dawn, Spectre. Direct purchase, master workshop, discretion.
rolls-royce.intro: Rolls-Royce is silence and substance. We carry Phantom, Ghost, Cullinan, Wraith, Dawn, Spectre — and selected classics. Direct purchase, master workshop, absolute discretion.
rolls-royce.body: With Rolls-Royce, spec detail is everything. Bespoke configurations from Goodwood (Mansory excluded) hold or appreciate. We inspect Spirit of Ecstasy for original Goodwood engraving, interior wood for authentic grain, picnic tables and starlight headliners for flawless function. On classics (Phantom V, Silver Cloud) it is substance over shine.
rolls-royce.models: Phantom · Phantom EWB · Ghost · Ghost EWB · Cullinan · Wraith · Dawn · Spectre · Silver Shadow · Silver Cloud · Phantom V

faq.a1: Focus on Wraith, Dawn, Cullinan, Ghost. Phantom rarer, always with bespoke-spec validation. Classics on request.
faq.q2: Do you also buy Rolls-Royce directly?
faq.a2: Yes — modern Rolls-Royce from Phantom VII (2003+), classics with full provenance. Direct, discreet, market-correct.
faq.a3: Yes. Our master workshop handles maintenance, repair, detailing and interior care for Rolls-Royce of all series — with BMW OEM diagnostics and genuine parts.

wartung.metaTitle: Sports Car Maintenance Freiburg — Ferrari · Porsche · Aston Martin | Prestige Selections
wartung.metaDescription: Manufacturer-standard maintenance and inspection for Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley, Maserati. Genuine parts, digital service history, collection and delivery in Freiburg.
wartung.intro: Regular maintenance is the best value protection for your sports car. Our master workshop carries out every inspection to manufacturer specification — Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley, Maserati, Rolls-Royce. With genuine parts, certified procedures and the care these motorcars deserve.
wartung.body: Every inspection follows the manufacturer's service schedule — from the small annual inspection to the major mileage-based service. We document every step in the digital service book and enter the inspection in the manufacturer's service booklet. The history stays complete — which is real money at the time of resale. Before we begin you receive a written, binding estimate. After completion you collect the car clean, fuelled and with a hand-over protocol. On request we collect from the Freiburg, Basel, Karlsruhe region and return it.
includes: Oil and filter change to manufacturer specification
Brake inspection, pad and disc thickness measurement
Suspension and chassis check on the lift
High-voltage and battery check on hybrid sports cars
Tyre tread measurement, pressure check, balancing on request
Air-conditioning check and cabin filter change
Software and ECU updates via OEM diagnostics
Digital service history and entry in the manufacturer's service book

faq.q1: How often should a Ferrari, Porsche or Aston Martin be serviced?
faq.a1: We follow the manufacturer's intervals — typically every 12 months or 10,000 to 15,000 km depending on marque and model. For low-mileage collector cars the annual interval applies regardless of distance.
faq.q2: Does a marque warranty remain valid at an independent master workshop?
faq.a2: For newer cars under factory warranty we comply with the EU Block Exemption Regulation for independent workshops: manufacturer-conforming procedures, genuine parts, entry in the service book. The warranty stays intact.
faq.q3: What does a major service cost for a Ferrari or Porsche?
faq.a3: Scope depends on model, year and mileage. Before every job you receive a written, binding estimate — no hidden items, no surprises at hand-over.

reparatur.metaTitle: Sports Car Repair Freiburg — Diagnostics · Genuine Parts · Marque Workshop | Prestige Selections
reparatur.metaDescription: Specialist repair for Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley, Maserati in Freiburg. Marque-specific diagnostics, genuine parts, transparent estimates.
reparatur.intro: From diagnosis to repair — our team works with modern diagnostic equipment and genuine parts. Gearbox, suspension, electronics or bodywork: we know the particulars of every sports car marque and repair so well that you notice no difference — except that everything works perfectly again.
reparatur.body: Honest diagnosis before every repair. We use marque-specific OEM diagnostic tools — not universal scanners that often only show half the picture on sports cars. On complex fault patterns we drive the car ourselves, listen and feel, before we use the lift. You receive a binding written estimate before we begin. If a second job turns out to be necessary during the work we stop and call. No surprises at hand-over. Repair history is documented so later buyers and other workshops can trace what was done and with which parts.
includes: OEM diagnostics for Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley
Gearbox repair and PDK / dual-clutch diagnostics
Suspension and damper overhaul
Electronics repair (ECUs, sensors, electrical system)
Brake system overhaul including carbon-ceramic
Air-conditioning repair and refrigerant service
Exhaust and emissions work
Transparent estimates and documented repair history

faq.q1: Do you also repair older sports cars from the 1980s and 1990s?
faq.a1: Yes. We repair analogue classics as confidently as modern bus-system cars. For older models we have the tools, the experience and a network of specialists for rare parts.
faq.q2: Do I receive a written estimate before the repair?
faq.a2: Always. After diagnosis you receive a written, binding estimate. We only begin after your approval. If unexpected work appears we call before we proceed.
faq.a3: Genuine manufacturer parts are standard. For rare classic parts no longer supplied we speak with you before turning to high-quality alternatives or newly manufactured parts.

aufbereitung.metaTitle: Sports Car Detailing Freiburg — Paint Correction · Ceramic Coating | Prestige Selections
aufbereitung.metaDescription: Professional detailing in Freiburg: multi-stage paint correction, ceramic coating, leather and Alcantara care for Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin.
aufbereitung.intro: Professional detailing brings the shine of your sports car back — and protects it for the future. We work with the best products and techniques: paint correction, ceramic coating, leather and interior care down to the smallest detail. For Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley, Maserati and Rolls-Royce.
aufbereitung.body: Detailing begins with assessment. We examine paint condition, film thickness, holograms, swirls and scratch traces under spot light and microfibre test. Only then do we set the number of correction stages — single-stage (holograms removed, light high-gloss) up to three-stage (deeper scratches, matte restoration polish). After correction the coating follows: ceramic or quartz with certified products, depending on use and storage. Interior: leather is not cleaned with multi-purpose spray. We use pH-neutral leather cleaners, conditioner and brushing tailored to Alcantara. On collector cars we discuss every step with you — patina that contributes to authenticity is preserved.
includes: Paint diagnosis with film thickness measurement
Multi-stage paint correction (one to three stages as required)
Ceramic or quartz coating with warranty
Wheel coating and brake-dust protection
Deep leather cleaning and conditioner treatment
Alcantara care and cleaning
Glass coating with water-beading effect
Engine bay and underbody cleaning on request

faq.q1: What is the difference between wax and ceramic coating?
faq.a1: Wax lasts weeks, ceramic coatings three to five years. Ceramic forms a crystalline protective layer that repels UV, bird droppings, insects and road salt far better than wax. For sports cars driven sparingly, ceramic is the more economical choice.
faq.q2: How long does a full detailing take?
faq.a2: Between two and five working days, depending on paint condition and scope. Multi-stage correction with ceramic coating needs time to cure. You receive a binding time estimate before we begin.
faq.q3: May I drive immediately after detailing?
faq.a3: Yes, drive yes — but no washing for seven to ten days. The coating needs curing time. You receive a written care protocol noting what to observe in the first weeks.

restauration.metaTitle: Classic-Car Restoration & Care Freiburg — Heritage Workshop | Prestige Selections
restauration.metaDescription: Classic-car restoration, storage and care for Ferrari, Porsche, Aston Martin, Mercedes classics in Freiburg. Value-preserving, documented, by the master.
restauration.intro: Classic sports cars need particular attention. Our specialists understand the mechanics, the materials and the philosophy behind every classic. We look after your motorcar long-term — from seasonal storage and regular exercise drives to full restoration. Value-preserving, traceable, documented.
restauration.body: With classics the question is not new versus original — it is what fits the car's history. Patina earned over decades is value. We do not restore out of vanity. Before every intervention we decide with you whether to work conservationally (preserve substance, restore function) or restoratively (return to original condition). Climate-controlled storage in our hall in Freiburg — constant temperature, controlled humidity, support wheels against flat spots. On request we run exercise drives in the right season. Restoration projects are documented with photographs and workshop protocol — important for later concours entries and resale.
includes: Climate-controlled storage in Freiburg (temperature, humidity)
Regular exercise drives to preserve substance
Substance preservation rather than invasive restoration
Full restoration planning with cost and time schedule
Paint and bodywork restoration to original specification
Engine overhaul with documented workshop protocol
Sourcing of historically correct original parts
Concours preparation for Villa d'Este, Chantilly, Salzburg, Schloss Bensberg

faq.q1: Do you store my classic over winter?
faq.a1: Yes. We offer climate-controlled storage in Freiburg — temperature and humidity regulation, regular visual inspection, and exercise drives on mild days on request.
faq.q2: Do you restore in-house or pass to specialists?
faq.a2: Most work — mechanics, conservation, paint detailing — is carried out in-house. For specialist bodywork or upholstery we work with a vetted network across Germany and Switzerland. But you always speak with us, never the subcontractor.
faq.q3: Do you also prepare classics for Concours d'Elegance?
faq.a3: Yes. We have prepared cars for Villa d'Este, Chantilly Arts & Elegance, Salzburg Concours and Schloss Bensberg. Lead time: ideally three to six months before the event.

cookie.title: Your Privacy
cookie.text: We use cookies to provide you with the best possible experience. You may choose which cookies you wish to allow.
cookie.necessaryDesc: Required for the basic functionality of the website.
cookie.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors use the website.

vehicleDetail.contactText: Contact us for a no-obligation consultation, a test drive, or further information about this vehicle.
vehicleDetail.notFoundText: The vehicle you are looking for is no longer available.
vehicleDetail.alsoWerkstatt: Have your {brand} serviced or repaired by us
vehicleDetail.alsoHaus: Who we are — the story behind Prestige Selections

q1.question: Which brands does Prestige Selections carry?
q1.answer: We specialise in Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, Bentley, Rolls-Royce, Aston Martin, and Maserati. Our inventory includes both current models and selected classics from these marques.

q2.question: Can I view a vehicle before purchasing?
q2.answer: Of course. Schedule a personal appointment at our showroom in Freiburg. We take the time for a thorough viewing and answer all your questions — discreetly and without obligation.

q3.question: Does Prestige Selections offer a workshop for sports cars?
q3.answer: Yes. Our master-certified workshop with 5 specialists focuses on maintenance, repair, and detailing for sports cars and classics. We use genuine parts and manufacturer-standard procedures.

q4.question: What does the buying process look like?
q4.answer: After viewing, we prepare an individual offer. Every vehicle undergoes a comprehensive technical inspection before sale. We assist with registration, insurance, and financing if needed.

q5.question: Does Prestige Selections deliver vehicles nationwide?
q5.answer: Yes, we deliver throughout Germany and Europe on request. Many of our clients purchase after a personal consultation by phone or video and receive their vehicle delivered to their door.

notFound.text: This page does not exist. But thirty others do.

impressum.label: Legal
impressum.title: Imprint
impressum.bindingNotice: Translation — only the German original is legally binding.
impressum.disputeBody: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
impressum.disputeBodyTail: The service provider is not obliged and not willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
impressum.liabilityContentBody: Sven Pflüger assumes no liability for the topicality, correctness, completeness or quality of the information provided. Liability claims against Sven Pflüger relating to material or immaterial damage caused by the use or non-use of the information offered, or by the use of incorrect or incomplete information, are excluded unless there is evidence of wilful intent or gross negligence on the part of the service provider.
impressum.liabilityLinksBody: For direct or indirect references to external websites that lie outside the responsibility of the service provider, liability would only apply if Sven Pflüger had knowledge of the content and it was technically possible and reasonable to prevent the use of unlawful content. Sven Pflüger expressly declares that no illegal content was identifiable on the linked pages at the time the links were set.
impressum.liabilityCopyrightBody: Sven Pflüger endeavours to respect the copyright of all images, graphics, sound documents, video sequences and texts used in publications, to use materials created himself, or to fall back on royalty-free resources. All brands and trademarks mentioned within the website that may be protected by third parties are subject to the provisions of applicable trademark law and the ownership rights of the respective registered owners.
impressum.liabilityPrivacyBody: Where the website offers the option of entering personal or business data (email addresses, names, postal addresses), the disclosure of this data is made on an expressly voluntary basis. Details see Privacy Policy.
impressum.liabilitySeverabilityBody: This disclaimer is to be regarded as part of the online offer. If parts or individual formulations of this text do not, no longer, or do not fully correspond to the applicable legal situation, the remaining parts of the document remain unaffected in their content and validity.
impressum.equalityBody: For ease of reading, the masculine form is used throughout this website for personal designations. Corresponding terms apply, in the interest of equal treatment, to all genders. The abbreviated language is for editorial reasons only and implies no value judgement.

datenschutz.label: Legal
datenschutz.title: Privacy policy
datenschutz.bindingNotice: This English version is a courtesy translation. The legally binding version is the German one.
datenschutz.intro: We process personal data only where necessary and following data minimisation principles. This statement informs you pursuant to Art. 13 and 14 GDPR about the nature, scope and purpose of processing.
datenschutz.controllerBody: The controller within the meaning of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other national data protection laws is:
datenschutz.controllerContact: Sven Pflüger · Schusterstraße 40 · 79098 Freiburg, Germany · Phone +49 176 4145 0810 · Email hallo@systembuero.com
datenschutz.collectionHeading: 2. Collection and storage of personal data
datenschutz.visitBody: When you access our website, your browser automatically sends information to the server, which is temporarily stored in a log file. The following information is collected without your active input and stored until automated deletion:
datenschutz.visitLog1: IP address of the requesting computer (anonymised)
datenschutz.visitLog3: Name and URL of the file retrieved
datenschutz.visitLog4: Referrer URL (website from which access occurred)
datenschutz.visitLog5: Browser used, operating system and access provider
datenschutz.visitLegal: Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR (legitimate interest). Log files are deleted after a maximum of 30 days.
datenschutz.formHeading: b) When using our contact form
datenschutz.formBody: For enquiries via the contact form, we store name, email address and message in order to reply. Phone number and vehicle specification are optional. Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) (a) GDPR (consent) and Art. 6 (1) (b) GDPR (pre-contractual measures). Data is deleted after final processing unless statutory retention obligations apply.
datenschutz.analyticsIntro: We use two analytics approaches with clearly separated roles:
datenschutz.plausibleHeading: a) Plausible Analytics (cookieless, no consent required)
datenschutz.plausibleBody: We use Plausible Analytics, an EU-hosted (Frankfurt, Germany) web analytics service that operates entirely without cookies and identifiers. No personal data is processed, no device fingerprints are created and no profiles are built. IP addresses are used only anonymised for aggregate detection and are not stored. Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR (legitimate interest in statistically anonymous reach measurement). Since no personal data is processed, no consent is required (§ 25 (2) German TTDSG).
datenschutz.stapeHeading: b) Server-side Google Tag Manager via Stape (consent only)
datenschutz.stapeBody: Optionally, with explicit consent, we use a server-side Google Tag Manager via Stape.io (sGTM container hosted on our own subdomain stape.prestige-selections.com). This proxy reduces the data passed to third parties to the minimum necessary. When consent is given, Google Analytics 4 or other marketing services can be loaded via the sGTM. Without your consent, no GTM tags are served. Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) (a) GDPR (consent), § 25 (1) German TTDSG.
datenschutz.consentModeNote: We use Google Consent Mode v2. By default, analytics_storage, ad_storage, ad_user_data and ad_personalization are set to "denied" and only switch to "granted" after your consent.
datenschutz.cookiesIntro: We use cookies in three categories:
datenschutz.cookieNecessary: Necessary cookies: required for operation (language setting, cookie consent status). Legal basis: § 25 (2) TTDSG (technical necessity).
datenschutz.cookieAnalytics: Analytics cookies: for reach measurement. Plausible uses NO cookies. Only with consent and only via the sGTM container.
datenschutz.cookieMarketing: Marketing cookies: for personalised advertising. Only after explicit consent via the cookie banner.
datenschutz.cookieControl: You can adjust your cookie settings at any time via the cookie banner or in your browser.
datenschutz.aiBody: This website uses some AI-generated images and videos. These are labelled as such, in accordance with the transparency obligations of EU Regulation 2024/1689 (AI Act). AI is used exclusively for illustrative atmospheric imagery — never for vehicle depictions. Vehicle photos exclusively show the real motorcars handled by us.
datenschutz.rightsIntro: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
datenschutz.rightsItem1: Right to information pursuant to Art. 15 GDPR about the data processed
datenschutz.rightsItem2: Right to rectification of inaccurate data pursuant to Art. 16 GDPR
datenschutz.rightsItem3: Right to erasure of your data pursuant to Art. 17 GDPR
datenschutz.rightsItem4: Right to restriction of processing pursuant to Art. 18 GDPR
datenschutz.rightsItem5: Right to data portability pursuant to Art. 20 GDPR (structured, common, machine-readable format)
datenschutz.rightsItem6: Right to withdraw given consent pursuant to Art. 7 (3) GDPR with effect for the future
datenschutz.rightsItem7: Right to object to processing based on legitimate interest pursuant to Art. 21 GDPR
datenschutz.rightsItem8: Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority pursuant to Art. 77 GDPR
datenschutz.rightsAuthority: Competent supervisory authority: Der Landesbeauftragte für den Datenschutz und die Informationsfreiheit Baden-Württemberg, Königstraße 10a, 70173 Stuttgart, Germany.
datenschutz.sslBody: This website uses TLS encryption (HTTPS) end-to-end with current cipher suites. You can identify an encrypted connection by the "https://" prefix and the lock icon in your browser's address bar. HSTS is enabled.
datenschutz.updatesBody: This privacy policy is current as of May 2026. As the website evolves or legal requirements change, adjustments may be necessary. The current version is always available on this page.

barrierefreiheit.label: Statement
barrierefreiheit.title: Accessibility
barrierefreiheit.intro: We want this website to be usable for everyone — regardless of vision, motor ability or the technology used.
barrierefreiheit.scopeBody: This statement applies to www.prestige-selections.com (all language versions DE · EN · FR) operated by Sven Pflüger, Schusterstraße 40, 79098 Freiburg, Germany.
barrierefreiheit.conformanceBody: We aim for conformance with the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 Level AA. The legal basis is the German Barrierefreiheitsstärkungsgesetz (BFSG, in force since 28 June 2025) implementing EU Directive 2019/882 (European Accessibility Act).
barrierefreiheit.limitationsBody: Some vehicle photo captions are not yet fully optimised for screen readers in every detail. PDF documents (sales materials) are being progressively converted to accessible versions. We continue to improve.
barrierefreiheit.measureItem1: Semantic HTML with correct heading hierarchy and landmarks.
barrierefreiheit.measureItem2: Full keyboard navigation with visible focus indicators.
barrierefreiheit.measureItem3: Colour contrast meeting APCA Lc ≥ 75 for body text.
barrierefreiheit.measureItem4: Respect for prefers-reduced-motion — every scroll animation has a static alternative.
barrierefreiheit.measureItem5: Alt text on all informative images; decorative images use empty alt attributes.
barrierefreiheit.feedbackBody: Encountered a barrier or have a suggestion? Write or call us — we review every report within fourteen days.
barrierefreiheit.escalationBody: If no satisfactory solution is found, you can contact the conciliation body under § 16 BGG: Schlichtungsstelle des Beauftragten der Bundesregierung für die Belange von Menschen mit Behinderungen, Mauerstraße 53, 10117 Berlin, Germany.
barrierefreiheit.methodology: Self-assessment by the development team, automated testing via axe-core, manual screen-reader testing.
